message:
feat: Bootstrap pt-math crate with numerically stable primitives

Partial progress on process_triage-40mt (pt-core bootstrap)

Creates the initial Rust workspace with pt-math crate providing
numerically stable primitives for log-domain Bayesian computation.

## Workspace Structure
Cargo.toml (workspace root)
└── crates/pt-math/     # Math utilities library

## Implemented Functions (crates/pt-math/src/math/stable.rs)

Log-domain arithmetic:
- log_sum_exp: Stable log(sum(exp(values)))
- log_add_exp: Stable log(exp(a) + exp(b))
- log_sub_exp: Stable log(exp(a) - exp(b))

Special functions:
- log_gamma/lgamma: Natural log of Gamma function (Lanczos approximation)
- log_beta: log B(a,b) = log Γ(a) + log Γ(b) - log Γ(a+b)
- log_factorial: log(n!) via Gamma function
- log_binomial: log binomial coefficient log(n choose k)

## Implementation Notes
- Uses Lanczos approximation (g=7, 9 coefficients) for Gamma function
- Handles edge cases: NaN, infinity, negative poles
- Uses reflection formula for z < 0.5
- Includes comprehensive unit tests

This provides the numerical foundation for:
- Posterior computation without underflow
- Bayes factor calculation in log-odds
- Beta-Binomial and Gamma-Poisson computations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# This file is automatically @generated by Cargo.
+# It is not intended for manual editing.
+version = 4
+
+[[package]]
+name = "pt-math"
+version = "0.1.0"
